calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Amy Shearer, Esq., assistant district attorney, for plaintiff/petitioner;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; First Set Of Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. Claimant Jocobi Perkins shall provide code compliant responses to Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories; First Set Of Judicial Council Form Interrogatories within 10 days.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Continued To Sep-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories.

Continued to September 20, 2018 per the request of the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
